title: Project Manager
description:
Job Requirements

  • Ensure proper planning and execution of projects to meet or exceed performance indicators in term of quality and timeframe.
  • Ensure project complies with legal requirements, building & safety codes as well as other regulations define by Singapore Building Construction Authority (BCA) and redesigning work flow and processes if necessary to mitigate safety risks.
  • Main point of contact and liaison between project teams and the client's representatives, consultants and relevant authorities.
  • Implement effective contract and claim management to increase the contractual margin and protect Company against liability claims.
  • Oversee the planning and delivery of works projects from beginning to end.
  • Attend regular meetings with the consultants or clients to update on the progress.
  • Manage and oversee day-to-day construction management of the project and sub-contractors’ performance.
  • Monitor and report project details, including progress, risks and opportunities in a timely manner.
  • Interpret and explain contracts and technical information to different trade contractors & site workers.
  • Define clear roles & responsibilities and deliverable requirements in terms of both scope and schedule to all the trade contractors.
  • Report on daily work progress status.
  • Lead and supervise construction personnel on site to ensure construction activities carry out properly and timely.
  • Manage and forecast monthly progress claim and expenditure budget to ensures it achieves beyond target profit margin.
  • Assist to the Senior Project Manager and any other job related adhoc duties.

Requirement

  • Have working experience in A&A, R&R, General Building Work & Civil Works
  • Possess good leadership and organizing skills
  • Hands-on person and able to work independently
  • Proficient in computer skills such as Microsoft Project /Word/PowerPoint/Excel etc
  • Candidate must possess at least a Degree in Engineering (Civil) or equivalent.
  • Preferably with Singapore Class 3 driving license & Own Vehicle

postedCompany.description:
A small and progressive company set up in 2019 which established the core foundation of professionlism, integrity and teamwork. We uphold and aspires to achieve continuous growth through competitive pricing, excellence in quality as well as value added services.


We invest heavily in human resource and staff training to equip staff effectively for their roles and responsibilties, thus embark on expansion for the future.
